meta.description: Key benchmark results for Genesis PROV 9 Bondability
meta.note: All results are from computational benchmarks against published data. No proprietary fab data used.

cmp_stine_1998.description: CMP recess prediction vs. Stine et al. 1998 (hold-out validation)
cmp_stine_1998.reference: Stine et al., IEEE Trans. Semicond. Manuf., 1998
cmp_stine_1998.method: PCHIP interpolation with 5 calibration knots, tested at 6 held-out densities
cmp_stine_1998.caveat: Stine 1998 data is for aluminum CMP, not copper damascene. Qualitative behavior similar, absolute values differ.

contact_turner_2002.description: Spectral contact solver vs. Turner & Spearing 2002
contact_turner_2002.method: 20 nm Gaussian bump on 64x64 grid, three configurations tested
contact_turner_2002.caveat: Qualitative physics checks only at tile resolution (25 um). Quantitative gap values approximate (2-5x error at tile scale).

thermal_suhir_1986.description: Thermal FEA vs. Suhir 1986 analytical solution
thermal_suhir_1986.method: Sharp Cu/SiO2 bimetallic strip on 50x50 grid

details.tolerance_justification: Sharp FD interface creates stress concentration that analytical solution averages out. 3x tolerance is conservative.

thermal_suhir_1986.caveat: Linear elastic only. No plasticity. At 300C anneal, peak stress may exceed Cu yield (~300 MPa).

yield_sanity.reference: Murphy, Proc. IEEE, 1964; Stapper, IBM J. Res. Dev., 1983
yield_sanity.method: Uniform 40x40 die at 50% density, low-defect vs. high-defect configurations
yield_sanity.caveat: correlation_length_um (default 500 um) is uncalibrated and dominates final yield. 200 um to 2000 um range swings yield by 20+ percentage points.

solver_capabilities.cmp_model: PCHIP interpolation with EPL kernel convolution
solver_capabilities.contact_solver: Spectral FFT with Dugdale cohesive zone, O(N log N)
solver_capabilities.thermal_solver: 2D plane-stress FEA with Voigt mixing (CPU and GPU variants)
solver_capabilities.yield_model: Murphy/Stapper negative binomial with Monte Carlo
solver_capabilities.optimizer: Multi-objective inverse design (additive and subtractive strategies)
solver_capabilities.drc_compiler: Threshold-based violation detection with KLayout marker output
